message:
test(cli-robot,bd-pdg22): metamorphic invariants for cass stats --json

Adds three stats-aggregation invariant tests under the existing
tests/cli_robot.rs harness for bead
coding_agent_session_search-pdg22 (child of ibuuh.10). The current
suite only asserts specific fixture snapshots for stats; nothing
pinned the GENERIC invariants the aggregation must preserve across
any corpus.

Tests added:

1. stats_by_agent_counts_sum_to_total_conversations
   Seeds three codex rollouts, runs \`cass index --full\`, then calls
   \`cass stats --json\` and asserts the sum of by_agent counts
   equals total_conversations. Catches regressions where an agent's
   contribution is lost or double-counted — something the frozen
   snapshot fixtures can't detect because they only inspect one
   corpus shape.

2. stats_date_range_oldest_is_not_after_newest
   Whenever date_range.oldest and date_range.newest are both present,
   oldest MUST be less-than-or-equal-to newest. Traps regressions
   that swap min/max or produce timezone-inconsistent timestamps.

3. stats_on_empty_indexed_db_reports_zeroes_and_empty_by_agent
   On a fresh corpus with zero seeded sessions, \`cass stats --json\`
   must report conversations=0, messages=0, by_agent=[]. Traps
   regressions that inherit cached values from a prior run or
   hallucinate counts.

All three seed (or explicitly do not seed) a fresh corpus per test
using the isolated_cass_cmd + seed_codex_session_s0cmk helpers
already defined in the file, so there is no cross-test state bleed
and no reliance on process-level cwd tricks.
